description: P1-D: clinical-vs-molecular disambiguation benchmark. Tests whether the disambiguation clause in gemini_extractor.py Stage 1 prompt correctly suppresses clinical lab-value abbreviations while preserving molecular gene findings.

ambiguous_pairs.ESR / ESR1: erythrocyte sedimentation rate (mm/h) vs estrogen receptor alpha gene (ESR1)
ambiguous_pairs.CRP: C-reactive protein inflammatory marker (mg/L) vs CRP gene
ambiguous_pairs.AST: aspartate aminotransferase liver function test (U/L) vs GOT1 gene
ambiguous_pairs.ACE: angiotensin-converting enzyme assay vs ACE gene (ACE insertion/deletion polymorphism)
ambiguous_pairs.BNP / NPPB: B-type natriuretic peptide blood test vs NPPB gene

acceptance_criteria.pass_condition: 0 clinical papers extract forbidden genes AND 0 molecular papers miss their must_extract gene

clinical_papers.title: Distinct characteristics of multisystem inflammatory syndrome in children in Poland
clinical_papers.notes: MIS-C inflammatory markers. CRP mg/L and BNP pg/mL used as clinical lab measurements throughout. Already confirmed to produce 0 genes in multiple runs.

clinical_papers.title: Curative effect of Guizhi-Shaoyao-Zhimu decoction combined with methotrexate in rheumatoid arthritis
clinical_papers.notes: RA herbal medicine RCT. Measures ESR (mm/h) and CRP (mg/L) as DAS28 components — purely clinical lab values.

clinical_papers.title: Safety, tolerability, pharmacokinetics, pharmacodynamics, and efficacy of WBP216 (IL-6 inhibitor) in rheumatoid arthritis
clinical_papers.notes: IL-6 monoclonal antibody Phase I trial. ESR mm/h and CRP mg/L used as clinical efficacy endpoints. IL-6 measured as serum level, not studied as a gene.

clinical_papers.title: Liver fibrosis assessment using serum biomarkers including AST/ALT in NAFLD
clinical_papers.notes: NAFLD clinical cohort. AST (U/L) and ALT (U/L) used as serum liver function markers, not as molecular genetics targets. GPT (HGNC symbol for ALT/alanine aminotransferase) added to forbidden list after first run extracted it — the disambiguation clause mentions GOT1/AST but not GPT/ALT.

clinical_papers.title: Efficacy of tofacitinib in rheumatoid arthritis stratified by baseline BMI
clinical_papers.notes: RA tofacitinib RCT with DAS28-ESR outcomes. ESR measured in mm/h as part of DAS28 composite score.

molecular_papers.title: ESR1 fusions and therapeutic resistance in metastatic breast cancer
molecular_papers.notes: Frontiers Oncol 2023. ESR1 gene fusions studied at molecular level. Key test: pipeline must NOT suppress ESR1 because 'ESR' looks like a lab value abbreviation.

molecular_papers.title: Effect of ACE I/D polymorphism on atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease risk
molecular_papers.notes: Genes 2022. ACE insertion/deletion polymorphism studied as genetic variant. Key test: 'ACE' must be extracted as a gene, not confused with ACE inhibitor drug class.

molecular_papers.title: Role of ACE gene polymorphism and ACE activity in predicting outcomes in heart failure
molecular_papers.notes: Second ACE test. Paper explicitly discusses ACE gene variants (I/D) AND serum ACE enzyme activity — strongest test of disambiguation (both senses appear in same paper).

molecular_papers.title: Exome sequencing identifies the cause of a mendelian disorder (Miller syndrome)
molecular_papers.notes: Control paper — no ambiguous abbreviations. Tests that disambiguation clause does not interfere with standard molecular genetics extraction. Already benchmarked (F1=0.333, reuse existing summary).

molecular_papers.title: A genome-wide association study of type 2 diabetes identifies novel susceptibility loci
molecular_papers.notes: Control paper — no ambiguous abbreviations. Tests that disambiguation clause does not interfere with GWAS gene extraction. Already benchmarked (F1=1.000, reuse existing summary).
